prs.title: Organised Space Weather and Business Page
Updated the homepage
prs.body: Updated the homepage to remove the Gallery, Projects, and Blogs sections. Each of them now has its own dedicated page.

prs.title: Improved Animations & Added Blog Page
prs.body: - Enhanced GSAP animations for smoother transitions and better responsiveness. - - Added a new Blog page with dynamic content rendering and clean layout. - - Optimized scroll behavior using ScrollTrigger and Lenis integration. - - Minor UI/UX improvements across sections for consistency and performance ![Uploading image.png…]()

prs.title: Improved Home Page And Contactus Page
prs.body: - Improved Contact Us page design - Enhanced Home page animations - Added smooth scrolling with Lenis.js - Implemented API route for blog data

prs.title: Updated Readme
prs.body:
Updated the README file with improved details, formatting, and clarity to make the project documentation more informative and user-friendly.

Fixes  #8

prs.title: Added Aboutus section
prs.body: Added About Us section - Included team details, mission & vision - Added smooth animations with Framer Motion - Updated Navbar with Home,Aboutus

prs.title: Feature/UI
prs.body:
Updated the button UI for a more modern look and fixed minor UI bugs to improve overall consistency and responsiveness.

Changes

Refined button design (colors, padding, and hover effects)

Fixed layout and alignment issues in UI components

Type of Change

🧩 UI Enhancement

🐞 Bug Fix

prs.title: Added Blogs section to navbar
prs.body: Added a new Blogs link in the navbar for quick access to Blogs

prs.title: Added Blogs Section
prs.body: @codervipul775 Added a new Blogs Section to display articles and updates. Implemented a clean, responsive layout using Tailwind CSS. Integrated dynamic blog links with slug-based routing.

prs.title: About Us
prs.body: Added About Us section - Included team details, mission & vision - Added member cards with images & LinkedIn links - Used shadcn/ui for design consistency - Added smooth animations with Framer Motion - Made layout fully responsive and theme-aligned

prs.title: Fix: updated club member count and improved descriptions
prs.body: Improved club directory background and overall UI, enhanced club descriptions for clarity and engagement, added the new Minds AI Club with details, and introduced an Achievements section to highlight  club’s milestones.

issues.title: Add “About Us” Section to the Website
issues.body: Create an engaging About Us section with team details, mission, and vision. I want to work on this issue @codervipul775
